description: Secure code with parameterized queries, environment-based secrets, and proper input validation

input.diff:
diff --git a/src/db.py b/src/db.py
index 1a2b3c4..9e8f7a6 100644
--- a/src/db.py
+++ b/src/db.py
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 import os
 import sqlite3
+from typing import Optional
 
 db = sqlite3.connect(os.environ['DATABASE_URL'])
 
+def get_user(username: str) -> Optional[dict]:
+    """Fetch user by username using parameterized query."""
+    if not isinstance(username, str) or len(username) > 128:
+        raise ValueError("Invalid username")
+    cursor = db.cursor()
+    cursor.execute(
+        "SELECT id, username, email FROM users WHERE username = ?",
+        (username,)
+    )
+    row = cursor.fetchone()
+    if row is None:
+        return None
+    return {"id": row[0], "username": row[1], "email": row[2]}
